docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY GHOZALI, SAID AS TO DEFENDANT VINCES, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
